name: gpd-arxiv
description: Optional/conditional arXiv paper search and retrieval via arxiv-mcp-server. Available only when the optional arxiv-mcp-server dependency is installed; search for physics papers, fetch abstracts, and download full text.
prerequisites: Install GPD before enabling built-in MCP servers.
availability_condition: Available only when the optional Python module 'arxiv_mcp_server' is installed.
